criteria.description: bin/sync-internal-versions accepts a target version and rewrites every internal waaseyaa/* constraint across packages/*/composer.json to ^<target>; idempotent.
criteria.evidence: WP01 commit 497d5c91d adds bin/sync-internal-versions + bin/lib/internal-version-sync.php with 5 functions (resolveCurrentVersion, expectedConstraint, findInternalDeps, validateVersionInput, syncManifestFile). 26 tests in tests/Integration/ReleaseTooling/SyncInternalVersionsTest.php cover idempotency and edge cases.
criteria.notes: Implementation deviation from plan D2: regex-based mutator instead of Composer\Json\JsonFile. Verified rationale — composer/composer is not in this repo's deps. Regex preserves JSON formatting; tests cover trailing-comma + unusual-key-order fixtures.

criteria.description: scripts/release.sh invokes the sync as part of the cut-a-release flow, before regenerating composer.lock and committing.
criteria.evidence: WP02 commit f45a813c7 adds the bin/sync-internal-versions invocation after the UNRELEASED_CONTENT check (~line 51), before tag-message extraction; reuses the already-parsed $SEMVER variable.
criteria.notes: scripts/release.sh is deprecated per #1385 but kept as fallback; mirrors release-cut.yml's behaviour.

criteria.description: release-cut.yml invokes the sync inside the existing concurrency: release-cut group, before CHANGELOG mutation + commit + tag.
criteria.evidence: WP02 commit f45a813c7 adds the 'Sync internal waaseyaa/* version constraints' step at release-cut.yml:128-138, after [Unreleased] validation, before CHANGELOG mutation. Comment reflects the script's actual deps after WP02 fix-up commit f2a23cb09 (pure PHP, no jq).
criteria.notes: YAML parses (python3 yaml.safe_load); inside existing concurrency group satisfies Risk R4.

criteria.description: Backfill: sync run once against current state advances literal from ^0.1.0-alpha.150 to current alpha; ~60 files, single mechanical commit.
criteria.evidence: WP04 commit 26c408265: 57 packages/*/composer.json + composer.lock, 446 insertions / 446 deletions = pure 1:1 token replacement. ^0.1.0-alpha.150 → ^0.1.0-alpha.175. Zero alpha.150 literals remain (verified by grep). Idempotency confirmed (second sync run produces no diff).
criteria.notes: Spec planned 56 packages; actual was 57 (one package added between spec and implementation). composer.lock regeneration produced 0 install / 0 update / 0 remove (constraints advanced within existing resolution).

criteria.description: bin/check-composer-policy extended with CP-NEW: every internal waaseyaa/* constraint must equal ^<resolveCurrentVersion()>; ci.yml composer-policy job has fetch-tags: true.
criteria.evidence: WP03 commit 8f009cad7 extends bin/check-composer-policy (bash + embedded Python) with CP-NEW. Strategy A (require WP01 lib) with Strategy B (Python subprocess git describe) fallback for graceful degradation. ci.yml composer-policy job's actions/checkout step opted into fetch-tags: true (Risk R2). 4 hermetic tests in tests/Integration/ReleaseTooling/CpNewCheckTest.php.
criteria.notes: Implementation language deviation from review brief: my brief incorrectly required PHP — the existing CP gate is bash + embedded Python. Sonnet correctly extended that pattern. CP-NEW correctly flagged ~210 alpha.150 violations on lane-c before WP04 backfill landed; resolves to green after lane convergence.

criteria.description: Unit tests for the sync script: idempotency, refusal of invalid input, JSON formatting preservation.
criteria.evidence: tests/Integration/ReleaseTooling/SyncInternalVersionsTest.php (26 tests / 52 assertions) covers: validate_input_accepts_clean_versions, validate_input_rejects_empty_dev_self_version_wildcards_and_placeholders, find_internal_deps, expected_constraint, sync_rewrites_internal_constraints, sync_is_idempotent, sync_preserves_json_formatting_trailing_comma_and_key_order, sync_skips_non_waaseyaa_dependencies, resolve_current_version_returns_tag_minus_v_prefix.

criteria.description: Documentation: CLAUDE.md note pointing at sync script + CP-NEW; CHANGELOG [Unreleased] bullet describing the mechanism.
criteria.evidence: WP05 commit 50ddc9d91 adds (1) one-line bullet to CLAUDE.md's 'Composer policy is codified' list pointing at bin/sync-internal-versions and CP-NEW, and (2) CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] ### Changed bullet referencing this mission slug, the WP04 backfill stats, and the new gate.

Pre-push hooks (lefthook) on lane-a (WP01 + WP04 + WP05 commits): spec-drift, composer-policy (CP001..CP006), phpstan, phpunit all green. Lane-b (WP02): spec-drift + composer-policy green (no PHP changes). Lane-c (WP03): pushed with --no-verify per Risk R3 — CP-NEW correctly flagged pre-WP04 alpha.150 violations as designed.
criteria.notes: Final mission-branch state has all lanes converged. CP-NEW + backfill together produce a green gate.

criteria.evidence: WP01 sonnet report confirmed 0 violations. No PHP code changes in WP02-WP05 affecting cs-check.
WP01 phpstan analyse on bin/lib/internal-version-sync.php and tests/Integration/ReleaseTooling/: [OK] No errors.
No internal layer changes; existing edges preserved by the sync (only constraint version literal updated, not the dependency set).

criteria.description: Quality gate: bin/check-composer-policy clean post-backfill (CP001..CP006 plus new CP-NEW).
criteria.evidence: Post-WP04 backfill: WP04 sonnet confirmed 'OK: Composer policy checks passed' on lane-a tree. Post-merge state: WP04's backfill + WP03's CP-NEW gate co-resident, gate evaluates green.

criteria.description: Quality gate: tools/drift-detector.sh reports no stale specs.
criteria.evidence: WP05 drift-detector pass: 'No specs affected by recent changes.' Zero stamps required.

negative_invariants.description: Root composer.json continues to use self.version for all waaseyaa/* siblings — backfill does NOT touch the root manifest.
negative_invariants.evidence: WP04 owned_files explicitly excludes root composer.json. Verified by inspecting the WP04 commit diff — root composer.json untouched.

negative_invariants.description: No wildcard internal constraints introduced. CP003 still satisfied.
negative_invariants.evidence: validateVersionInput rejects wildcards (*, x, X, ?). Sync script cannot emit a wildcard. CP003 evaluation green.

negative_invariants.description: scripts/release.sh remains deprecated per #1385 but still functional as a fallback. WP02 mirrors release-cut.yml's sync step rather than replacing the deprecated script.
negative_invariants.verification_command: rg 'DEPRECATED AS THE CANONICAL PATH' scripts/release.sh
negative_invariants.evidence: Header preserved; sync invocation added in lockstep with the canonical path.
